task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ServiceDesk Plus dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile icon or welcome message for 'administrator').

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Category configuration settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Admin settings page is open, specifically showing the Helpdesk Customizer or Category list view.

task_completion.description: Verify the top-level category 'Cloud Services' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The category 'Cloud Services' is visible in the list of categories in the ServiceDesk Plus interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the subcategory 'Provisioning' was created under 'Cloud Services'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The subcategory 'Provisioning' is visible and explicitly associated with the parent category 'Cloud Services' in the category/subcategory list or configuration page.

task_completion.description: Verify the subcategory 'Performance Issues' was created under 'Cloud Services'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The subcategory 'Performance Issues' is visible and explicitly associated with the parent category 'Cloud Services' in the category/subcategory list or configuration page.

task_completion.description: Verify the subcategory 'Access Management' was created under 'Cloud Services'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The subcategory 'Access Management' is visible and explicitly associated with the parent category 'Cloud Services' in the category/subcategory list or configuration page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to create categories and subcategories.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with web forms, buttons, and menus in the ServiceDesk Plus interface, rather than terminal windows or SQL clients.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show the local ServiceDesk Plus URL, and the UI should match the standard ServiceDesk Plus web interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No code editors, terminal scripts, or API testing tools (like Postman or curl) should be visible performing the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target top-level category to be created is exactly 'Cloud Services'. The three target subcategories to be created under it are exactly 'Provisioning', 'Performance Issues', and 'Access Management'.
